children.html: a,b∈Ra,b\in\mathbb{R}a,b∈R
g(X)=a+bXg(X) = a+bXg(X)=a+bX
E⁡(a+bX)=a+bE⁡(X)\operatorname{E}(a+b X) = a + b \operatorname{E}(X)E(a+bX)=a+bE(X)

children.value: 例として離散型確率変数とする

children.html: E⁡(a+bX)=∑xi∈X(a+bxi)fX(xi)=a∑xi∈XfX(xi)⏟=1+b∑xi∈XxifX(xi)⏟=E⁡(X)=a+bE⁡(X)\begin{aligned} \operatorname{E}(a+b X) &= \sum_{x_i\in \mathcal{X}} (a + b x_i) f_X(x_i)\\ &= a \underbrace{ \sum_{x_i\in \mathcal{X}} f_X(x_i) }_{=1} + b \underbrace{ \sum_{x_i\in \mathcal{X}} x_i f_X(x_i) }_{=\operatorname{E}(X)}\\ &= a + b \operatorname{E}(X) \end{aligned}E(a+bX)​=xi​∈X∑​(a+bxi​)fX​(xi​)=a=1xi​∈X∑​fX​(xi​)​​+b=E(X)xi​∈X∑​xi​fX​(xi​)​​=a+bE(X)​
E[(X−E[X])2]E[(X- E[X])^2]E[(X−E[X])2]
XXX
Var⁡(X)=E[(X−E[X])2]=∑(xi−E⁡(X))2f(xi)\operatorname{Var}(X) = E[(X- E[X])^2] = \sum (x_i - \operatorname{E}(X))^2 f(x_i)Var(X)=E[(X−E[X])2]=∑(xi​−E(X))2f(xi​)
Var⁡(X)=E⁡[(X−E⁡[X])2]=E⁡[X2]−E⁡[X]2\operatorname{Var}(X) = \operatorname{E}[(X - \operatorname{E}[X])^2] = \operatorname{E}[X^2] - \operatorname{E}[X]^2Var(X)=E[(X−E[X])2]=E[X2]−E[X]2

E⁡[(X−E⁡[X])2]=E⁡[X2−2E⁡[X]X+E⁡[X]2]=E⁡[X2]−2E⁡[X]2+E⁡[X]2=E⁡[X2]−E⁡[X]2\begin{aligned} \operatorname{E}[(X - \operatorname{E}[X])^2] &= \operatorname{E}[X^2 - 2 \operatorname{E}[X] X + \operatorname{E}[X]^2]\\ &= \operatorname{E}[X^2] - 2 \operatorname{E}[X]^2 + \operatorname{E}[X]^2\\ &= \operatorname{E}[X^2] - \operatorname{E}[X]^2\\ \end{aligned}E[(X−E[X])2]​=E[X2−2E[X]X+E[X]2]=E[X2]−2E[X]2+E[X]2=E[X2]−E[X]2​

E[g(x, y) \mid X=x]=\int_{-\infty}^{\infty} g(x, y) f_{Y \mid X}(y \mid x) d y=\frac{\int_{-\infty}^{\infty} g(x, y) f_{X, Y}(x, y) d y}{f_X(x)}
children.html: E[g(x,y)∣X=x]=∫−∞∞g(x,y)fY∣X(y∣x)dy=∫−∞∞g(x,y)fX,Y(x,y)dyfX(x)E[g(x, y) \mid X=x]=\int_{-\infty}^{\infty} g(x, y) f_{Y \mid X}(y \mid x) d y=\frac{\int_{-\infty}^{\infty} g(x, y) f_{X, Y}(x, y) d y}{f_X(x)}E[g(x,y)∣X=x]=∫−∞∞​g(x,y)fY∣X​(y∣x)dy=fX​(x)∫−∞∞​g(x,y)fX,Y​(x,y)dy​

Var⁡(Y∣X=x)=EY∣X[(Y−EY∣X[Y∣X=x])2∣X=x]=EY∣X[Y2∣X=x]−(EY∣X[Y∣X=x])2\begin{aligned} \operatorname{Var}(Y \mid X=x) & =E^{Y \mid X}\left[\left(Y-E^{Y \mid X}[Y \mid X=x]\right)^2 \mid X=x\right] \\ & =E^{Y \mid X}\left[Y^2 \mid X=x\right]-\left(E^{Y \mid X}[Y \mid X=x]\right)^2 \end{aligned}Var(Y∣X=x)​=EY∣X[(Y−EY∣X[Y∣X=x])2∣X=x]=EY∣X[Y2∣X=x]−(EY∣X[Y∣X=x])2​

children.value: 繰り返し期待値の法則

children.label: 繰り返し期待値の法則

children.html: E[Y∣X]E[Y|X]E[Y∣X]
XXX

children.value: について期待値をとったものは

children.html: E[Y]E[Y]E[Y]
EX[E[Y∣X]]=E[Y]E_X[E[Y|X]] = E[Y]EX​[E[Y∣X]]=E[Y]

children.value: 繰り返し期待値の法則
（the law of total expectation, the law of iterated expectations: LIE）という。

\begin{align}
E_X[E[Y|X]]
&= \int E[Y|X=x] f_X(x) dx\\
&= \int \left( \int y \frac{f_{X,Y}(x, y)}{f_X(x)} dy \right) f_X(x) dx\\
&= \int \int y f_{X,Y}(x, y) dy dx\\
&= \int y \underbrace{ \int f_{X,Y}(x, y) dx }_{周辺確率密度関数 f_Y(y)} dy \\
&= \int y f_Y(y) dy\\
&= E[Y]
\end{align}
children.html: EX[E[Y∣X]]=∫E[Y∣X=x]fX(x)dx=∫(∫yfX,Y(x,y)fX(x)dy)fX(x)dx=∫∫yfX,Y(x,y)dydx=∫y∫fX,Y(x,y)dx⏟周辺確率密度関数fY(y)dy=∫yfY(y)dy=E[Y]\begin{align} E_X[E[Y|X]] &= \int E[Y|X=x] f_X(x) dx\\ &= \int \left( \int y \frac{f_{X,Y}(x, y)}{f_X(x)} dy \right) f_X(x) dx\\ &= \int \int y f_{X,Y}(x, y) dy dx\\ &= \int y \underbrace{ \int f_{X,Y}(x, y) dx }_{周辺確率密度関数 f_Y(y)} dy \\ &= \int y f_Y(y) dy\\ &= E[Y] \end{align}EX​[E[Y∣X]]​=∫E[Y∣X=x]fX​(x)dx=∫(∫yfX​(x)fX,Y​(x,y)​dy)fX​(x)dx=∫∫yfX,Y​(x,y)dydx=∫y周辺確率密度関数fY​(y)∫fX,Y​(x,y)dx​​dy=∫yfY​(y)dy=E[Y]​​
X=(X1,…,Xn)⊤X = (X_1,\dots,X_n)^\topX=(X1​,…,Xn​)⊤
nnn

children.value: 次元確率変数ベクトルとする。各変数の期待値のベクトル

children.html: E[X]=μ=(E[X1]⋮E[Xn])E[X] = \mu = \begin{pmatrix} E[X_1] \\ \vdots \\ E[X_n] \end{pmatrix}E[X]=μ=⎝⎛​E[X1​]⋮E[Xn​]​⎠⎞​

children.value: を期待値ベクトルという。

children.html: σ=Var⁡[X]=E[(X−E[X])(X−E[X])⊤]\sigma = \operatorname{Var}[X] = E[(X - E[X])(X - E[X])^\top]σ=Var[X]=E[(X−E[X])(X−E[X])⊤]
aaa
BBB
Var⁡[a+BX]=BVar⁡[X]B⊤\operatorname{Var}[a + B X] = B \operatorname{Var}[X] B^\topVar[a+BX]=BVar[X]B⊤

children.value:
\begin{aligned}
\operatorname{Var}[a + B X]
&= E[(a + B X - E[a + B X])(a + B X - E[a + B X])^\top]\\
&= E[(B X - E[B X])(B X - E[B X])^\top] \quad (\because aは定数のためE[a] = a)\\
&= E[B (X - E[X])[B(X - E[X])]^\top]\\
&= E[B (X - E[X])(X - E[X])^\top B^\top] \quad (\because (AB)^\top = B^\top A^\top)\\
&= B E[(X - E[X])(X - E[X])^\top ] B^\top \\
&= B \operatorname{Var}[X] B^\top
\end{aligned}
children.html: Var⁡[a+BX]=E[(a+BX−E[a+BX])(a+BX−E[a+BX])⊤]=E[(BX−E[BX])(BX−E[BX])⊤](∵aは定数のためE[a]=a)=E[B(X−E[X])[B(X−E[X])]⊤]=E[B(X−E[X])(X−E[X])⊤B⊤](∵(AB)⊤=B⊤A⊤)=BE[(X−E[X])(X−E[X])⊤]B⊤=BVar⁡[X]B⊤\begin{aligned} \operatorname{Var}[a + B X] &= E[(a + B X - E[a + B X])(a + B X - E[a + B X])^\top]\\ &= E[(B X - E[B X])(B X - E[B X])^\top] \quad (\because aは定数のためE[a] = a)\\ &= E[B (X - E[X])[B(X - E[X])]^\top]\\ &= E[B (X - E[X])(X - E[X])^\top B^\top] \quad (\because (AB)^\top = B^\top A^\top)\\ &= B E[(X - E[X])(X - E[X])^\top ] B^\top \\ &= B \operatorname{Var}[X] B^\top \end{aligned}Var[a+BX]​=E[(a+BX−E[a+BX])(a+BX−E[a+BX])⊤]=E[(BX−E[BX])(BX−E[BX])⊤](∵aは定数のためE[a]=a)=E[B(X−E[X])[B(X−E[X])]⊤]=E[B(X−E[X])(X−E[X])⊤B⊤](∵(AB)⊤=B⊤A⊤)=BE[(X−E[X])(X−E[X])⊤]B⊤=BVar[X]B⊤​

children.value: 久保川 達也（2017）『現代数理統計学の基礎』、共立出版。
